// Negative fixture for spec 120 R6 scan (f) (defense-in-depth): a
// specs-root os.ReadDir whose enumerated names reach a filepath.Join
// with NO idvalidate gate in the declaration. The scan must flag it.
package fixture

import (
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func ungatedSpecsEnumeration(root string) []string {
	specsDir := filepath.Join(root, ".mindspec/specs")
	entries, err := os.ReadDir(specsDir)
	if err != nil {
		return nil
	}
	var out []string
	for _, e := range entries {
		// The enumerated (agent-creatable) name reaches a Join with
		// no idvalidate anywhere in this declaration — RED.
		out = append(out, filepath.Join(specsDir, e.Name(), "spec.md"))
	}
	return out
}
